title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at NHPC Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at NHPC Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, NHPC Holdings Services in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About NHPC Holdings Services:
NHPC Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC Holdings Services!
